name: Shimbol Memory I 5.5 Inch 3D LUT 4K HDMI Touchscreen Recorder Monitor
description: The Memory I 5.5" 4K HDMI Touchscreen Recorder/Monitor from Shimbol enables you to view up to DCI 4K25 input and capture 1080p60 video with an applied 3D LUT.

features.Key Features:: 1920 x 1080 Touchscreen Display | Up to DCI 4K25 HDMI Video Input | 1080p60 Recording to SD Card | 2000 cd/m² Brightness | HDR Monitoring, 3D LUT Support | Waveform, Vectorscope, Focus Peaking | Markers, False Color, Color Temperature | Embedded Audio, 3.5mm Headphone Port | Power via L-Series/F970 or DC Input | 1/4"-20 Thread & Shoe Mount Included
features.What's in the box?: Shimbol Memory I 5.5" 3D LUT 4K HDMI Touchscreen Recorder/Monitor | SD Card | SD Card Holder | Tempered Screen Protector | HDMI Cable | Shoe Mount Adapter | Limited 14-Month Manufacturer Warranty
